# Models overview

All current Claude models support text and image input and text output.

Claude Fable 5 (`claude-fable-5`) is generally available. Claude Mythos 5 (`claude-mythos-5`) joins the invitation-only Claude Mythos Preview (`claude-mythos-preview`).

| Feature               | Claude Fable 5      | Claude Opus 4.8 | Claude Sonnet 5        |
| --------------------- | ------------------- | --------------- | ---------------------- |
| **Description**       | Long-running agents | Complex coding  | Speed and intelligence |
| **Claude API ID**     | claude-fable-5      | claude-opus-4-8 | claude-sonnet-5        |
| **Claude API alias**  | claude-fable-5      | claude-opus-4-8 | claude-sonnet-5        |
| **Extended thinking** | No                  | No              | No                     |
| **Adaptive thinking** | Yes (always on)     | Yes             | Yes                    |
| **Context window**    | 1M tokens           | 1M tokens       | 1M tokens              |
| **Max output**        | 128k tokens         | 128k tokens     | 128k tokens            |

| Feature               | Claude Opus 4.7 |
| --------------------- | --------------- |
| **Claude API ID**     | claude-opus-4-7 |
| **Claude API alias**  | claude-opus-4-7 |
| **Extended thinking** | No              |
| **Adaptive thinking** | Yes             |
| **Context window**    | 1M tokens       |
| **Max output**        | 128k tokens     |
